scripts.ports:kill: for p in 3000 3001 3002 3003 3004 3005 3006; do lsof -ti :$p | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; done; echo 'Cleared dev ports 3000–3006 (macOS/Linux).'
scripts.dev:fresh: npm run ports:kill && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build -w @cb/login && npm run build -w @cb/platform && npm run build -w @cb/api
scripts.build:all: npm run build -w @cb/login && npm run build -w @cb/platform && npm run build -w @cb/api && npm run build -w @cb/capitalstress && npm run build -w @cb/capitalhealth && npm run build -w @cb/incomeengineering && npm run build -w @cb/forever
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @cb/login && npm run typecheck -w @cb/platform && npm run typecheck -w @cb/api
